nasb.text: He shall lay his hand on the head of the burnt offering, that it may be accepted for him to make atonement on his behalf.

esv.text: He shall lay his hand on the head of the burnt offering, and it shall be accepted for him to make atonement for him.

cnv.text: 他要按手在燔祭牲的頭上，燔祭就蒙悅納，可以為他贖罪。

ccb.text: 献祭者要把手放在牛头上，所献的燔祭便蒙悦纳，为他赎罪。
